case_title: CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. ALBERT LEANILLO ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT LEANILLO, ALBERT BURA-LEANILLO, SHERLYN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-30-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ALBERT LEANILLO RETURND = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY SHEILA ROBLETO--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CCSF-TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEANILLO, ALBERT BURA-LEANILLO, SHERLYN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,045.50, ORDER IS JOINT AND SERVED AGAINST BOTH DEFENDANTS; DEFENDANTS DID NOT APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
